benefits.description: Dramatically increases smooth-muscle activity in intestines, acting as a very effective laxative; useful for occasional constipation

side_effects.description: Intense warm pressurized feeling in the head within two minutes of injecting, neither pleasant nor unpleasant, brief physiological impact
Urgent bowel movement within 10-20 minutes of injection

protocol_notes: Uses injection route. Reports no psychoactive, mood-improving, anti-anxiety, or anti-depressive effects. Uses it primarily for its laxative properties.
